title: Hand off vetted explainers to ewing-info-translations
context: Backlog/future (unscheduled). Once patient-facing explainers pass the M3 oncologist + advocate blocking gate, they can be packaged for handoff to the separate HIGH-risk ewing-info-translations project, which owns translation under its own expert gate. Translation itself is out of scope here; this task only assembles vetted, signed-off, fully-provenanced explainers and their citations for handoff. No relicensing of copyrighted source.
objective: Package the vetted, signed-off plain-language explainers with provenance and citations for handoff to the ewing-info-translations project.
acceptanceCriteria: Only explainers that passed the M3 oncologist + advocate blocking sign-off are eligible for handoff.
The handoff package preserves provenance, citations, and the not-advice + not-eligibility-determination labels.
Translation is performed under the ewing-info-translations project's own HIGH-risk gate, not here.
Licensing is source-compatible; no copyrighted source is relicensed.
